per_scenario.one_line_critique: The final summary is high-judgment and sharp, but the agent performed redundant and failing tool calls before responding.
The agent entered a catastrophic runaway loop of duplicate SQL queries and todo updates, failing to provide any answer.
The agent entered a catastrophic runaway loop of duplicate SQL queries and failed to acknowledge the dashboard created in the first turn.
Leads directly with the answer and uses sharp, comparative language, though it adds unnecessary speculation and failed multiple tool calls.
